sentence_reviews.text: Forecasting and anomaly systems model temporal patterns to predict future values, detect deviations, estimate risk, or flag fraud and equipment failure.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Selective state-space models (Mamba family), LSTMs & GRUs.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection integrates Selective state-space models (Mamba family) as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate_references metadata only; no quoted passages or line-level excerpts supplied. Candidate sources: ref_dlbook: Deep Learning (2016); ref_lstm: Long Short-Term Memory (1997); ref_mamba: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces (2023); ref_nist: AI Risk Management Framework 1.0 (2023); ref_pml: Probabilistic Machine Learning: An Introduction (2022); ref_s4: Efficiently Modeling Long Sequences with Structured State Spaces (2021); ref_aima: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach, 4th ed. (2021).
sentence_reviews.notes: Selective state-space models are explicitly sequence models; their use in time-series workflows is defensible synthesis. The sentence frames the dependency generically as application integration.

sentence_reviews.text: Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection integrates LSTMs & GRUs as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate_references metadata only; no quoted passages or line-level excerpts supplied. sentence_reviews.notes: LSTMs/GRUs are sequence models commonly used for time-series forecasting and anomaly tasks; core strength is defensible. The sentence frames the dependency generically as application integration.

sentence_reviews.text: Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection integrates Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Packet candidate_references metadata only; no quoted passages or line-level excerpts supplied. sentence_reviews.notes: Risk estimates and anomaly/fraud decisions require uncertainty evaluation; common strength is defensible synthesis. The sentence frames the dependency generically as application integration.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Time-series forecasting, anomaly & fraud detection is modeled as depending on Selective state-space models (Mamba family), LSTMs & GRUs and feeding downstream nodes such as Autonomous vehicles, drones & navigation, Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting, Cybersecurity, finance & operational risk AI.
